name: RPlog_talk_Direx_Board_Meets_New_FLS_Head_retcon
title: Talk Page: A Disputed Retcon
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page serving as a working copy for retroactively modifying a disputed Direx Board scene. Xerxes explains the article exists to resolve objections while preserving the roleplay before replacing the main log. Alienplayer argues the attempt is premature and unfair to participants, insisting no action be taken until Minkar rules on the matter, while Krel Scrinae weighs in on the minor question of who ran the Prex during the meeting. The discussion is entirely editorial dispute resolution with no in-character content.
